assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking compatibility matrix with 'kubectl version --short' and 'istioctl version' commands and mentions downloading compatible Istio version

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Check Compatibility Matrix' section with command to 'Verify Istio version compatibility with GKE 1.32'

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response recommends upgrading GKE control plane first, then Istio control plane - does not advise upgrading Istio first when current version doesn't support target K8s

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response does not explain the mutating webhook mechanism or mention potential issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes command to verify sidecar versions: 'kubectl get pods -n production -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}{"\t"}{.spec.containers[?(@.name=="istio-proxy")].image}{"\n"}{end}'

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring proxy versions and checking 'istioctl proxy-status' to verify consistency

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check proxy configurations and versions

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While response mentions checking for compatibility and version verification, it does not explicitly warn about traffic disruption from control plane/sidecar version mismatches
